title: Lumerite
description: Adds a new ITE to the game that can be found in end dimension, lumerite tools and armor also added
body: Have you ever wondered why theres no lumerite debris inside of minecraft? do you want it? Well this is the perfect mod for you then, If you have overheard enderite well this is a solid change from that, its easier to obtain and pretty much the same Mine faster with the lumerite pickaxe, kill your friends with the lumerite sword, and all of the other tools are pretty much just better versions of netherite... Oh and.. use lumerite armor to become immortal, Therefore, Have fun!
